name: Bass Point Resort
description: Bass Point Resort is a place to play pickleball in Gravois Mills, MO. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Laurie Fairgrounds
description: Courts were new October 2025. Exterior fence scheduled for late November, but playable if you don't mind chasing a few balls.

name: Versailles City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Versailles City Park in Versailles, MO! There is 1 outdoor asphalt and concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Players have access to restrooms and water. The court is free.
